description_long: This is a single-serving cup of strawberry-flavored dairy snack, likely yogurt or a similar product, with a tapered cylindrical shape and a foil lid. The packaging is predominantly white with vibrant red strawberries and green leaves illustrated on the label, along with elegant script and block text in Czech. The top of the lid features a large, realistic strawberry image and the product name, while the sides display detailed product information, branding, and a barcode. The cup appears to be made of plastic, with a thin metallic foil seal on top. The branding includes a blue and white logo, and the overall design is clean and visually appealing, emphasizing freshness and flavor. The object is lightweight and portable, suitable for consumption on the go.
description: A white plastic cup with a foil lid, decorated with red strawberries and branding, containing a strawberry-flavored dairy snack. The packaging is visually appealing and portable.
description_view_0: Front view showing the foil lid with a large strawberry image and prominent product branding.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the product name, strawberry graphics, and part of the nutritional information panel.
description_view_2: Side view with more detailed text, including ingredients and branding, and a partial view of the lid.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the barcode, additional strawberries, and more branding elements.
attribute_brand_logo: A blue and white rectangular logo with the text 'BOHUSOVICKA MLEKARNA 1901' is visible on the lid and side of the cup.
attribute_flavor_indication: Strawberry flavor is indicated by large red strawberry graphics and the word 'jahoda' (strawberry) on the label.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: Nutritional and ingredient information is visible on the side of the cup in small text.
